top_tweets.text: As AI agents accelerate coding, what is the future of software engineering? Some trends are clear, such as the Product Management Bottleneck, referring to the idea that we are more constrained by deciding what to build rather than the actual building. But many implications, like
top_tweets.author: AndrewYNg
top_tweets.name: Andrew Ng
top_tweets.summary_zh: 隨著 AI agent 加速編碼過程，軟體工程的未來將面臨「產品管理瓶頸」：我們更受限於決定該做什麼，而非實際建造本身。

top_tweets.text:
This is really accurate. 

As much as we all want to drink the vibe coding kool-aid, the reality is that 90%+ of all code in a company is maintaining and migrating existing stuff that is complicated and messy. You can definitely vibe code the remaining 10% but unless there is a
top_tweets.author: chamath
top_tweets.name: Chamath Palihapitiya
top_tweets.summary_zh: 回應「週末就能 vibe code 做出來」的說法，指出現實中公司 90% 以上的程式碼是在維護和遷移既有複雜系統，vibe coding 只適用剩下的 10%。

context.quoted_text:
Every time I see a tweet saying “I can vibe code this in a weekend” - I think of the slack notification system..

It takes time, persistence and effort to get the details right. 

Sure, a lot of simple workflows will get vibe coded away. And maybe you can put this in Claude Code and get the code right in one shot. 

But quality, depth and great systems will still have value and take time. You can’t vibe code lessons. 

Now and forever.

top_tweets.text:

I can tell you that AI is by FAR the

top_tweets.text:
We're being spoiled.

Wonder is the first AI design tool that actually feels like you're using Figma.

I don't say that lightly. It feels insanely refined. Yet, everything you're designing is backed by actual code.

This is the enivitable future of design.
top_tweets.author: BrettFromDJ
top_tweets.name: Brett
top_tweets.summary_zh: Wonder 是首款真正像在用 Figma 的 AI 設計工具，但背後生成的是實際程式碼，被認為是設計工具的必然未來。

top_tweets.text:
AI has completely changed how I work.

Over the weekend I built myself a personal investment tool without opening an IDE or Figma.

It has agents, chat, fundamentals, screener, and so much more. All perfectly customized to my needs. And it's insanely fast and fun to use. https://t.co/N7ybNUDeCG
top_tweets.author: brotzky
top_tweets.name: Brotzky
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者在週末不開 IDE 或 Figma，靠 AI 為自己打造了完整的個人投資分析工具，包含 agent、聊天、篩選器等功能，且極快又好用。

top_tweets.text:
Being a solo-founder:

- 10% coding
- 15% marketing
- 5% operations
- 5% management
- 1% mental control

- 18% customer support
- 12% sales
- 10% debugging
- 8% product strategy
- 5% finance
- 5% “wtf isn’t this working” existential crisis

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Windsurf 2.0

top_products.title: Google Chrome Skills

top_products.title: Subspace
top_products.author: Joe Fernandez
top_products.tagline: All your Agents in one app and persistent context
top_products.summary_zh: 集中管理所有 AI Agent 的應用程式，提供持久化的上下文記憶功能，適合需要同時使用多個 AI 代理的使用者。

top_products.title: Chinilla

top_products.tagline: Design systems, simulate them and watch where they break
top_products.summary_zh: 用於設計和模擬系統的工具，幫助使用者識別系統中的潛在問題和失效點。

top_products.summary_zh: 同時調用五個前沿 AI 模型來回答問題，提供多角度的分析和討論結果。

top_products.title: TaskShell
